title: coreopsis rosea
intro: Coreopsis rosea, also known as the pink coreopsis, is a flowering plant species native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of coreopsis rosea include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and ease respiratory problems. Coreopsis rosea can be used to make herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and salves, which are often used to treat a variety of ailments.
